publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-06-05 18:15:38 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, course material, memorabilia, and published material.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, course material, awards, and publications documenting her founding of the academic field of functional apparel design and her career at Cornell.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Watkins earned a B.S. in consumer services and business in 1965 and an M.S. in textiles and clothing in1967 both from Pennsylvania State University. In 1967 she was hired in the Department of Textiles and Apparel at Cornell University as an assistant professor, becoming a professor emeritus in 1999. She founded the academic field of functional apparel design and in 1991 was inducted as a Fellow into the International Textile and Apparel Association.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, course material, awards, and publications documenting her founding of the academic field of functional apparel design and her career at Cornell.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Susan Watkins papers, #23-19-4278. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
